<p class="key-answer" data-question="Lapatinib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Lapatinib</strong> 目前有 <strong>27 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Lapatinib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Tyverb is indicated for the treatment of patients with breast cancer, whose tumours overexpress HER2 (ErbB2):  in combination with capecitabine for patients with advanced or metastatic disease with...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>dermatofibrosarcoma protuberans（99.3%）</li>
<li>fibroblastic neoplasm（98.4%）</li>
<li>conventional fibrosarcoma（98.4%）</li>
<li>kidney fibrosarcoma（98.3%）</li>
<li>cysticercosis（98.3%）</li>
<li>heart fibrosarcoma（98.2%）</li>
<li>low grade fibromyxoid sarcoma（98.2%）</li>
<li>Plasmodium falciparum malaria（98.0%）</li>
<li>coenurosis（97.5%）</li>
<li>HER2 positive breast carcinoma（97.4%）</li>
<li>lymphangiomyoma（97.3%）</li>
<li>benign PEComa（97.3%）</li>
<li>uterine corpus perivascular epithelioid cell tumor（97.3%）</li>
<li>autosomal recessive familial Mediterranean fever（97.0%）</li>
<li>liver fibrosarcoma（96.9%）</li>
<li>cutaneous undifferentiated pleomorphic sarcoma（96.7%）</li>
<li>central nervous system fibrosarcoma（96.4%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor positive breast cancer（96.3%）</li>
<li>normal breast-like subtype of breast carcinoma（96.3%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor negative breast cancer（96.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
